title: Set Timeline with dependency on 2 other items
excerpt: I have an item in a project plan that needs to have its start date in the timeline column dependent on Milestone 1, but its end date (and duration) dependent on Milestone 2. Trying to use dependencies with lag, but am dr…

posts.author: PetraD (Petra)
posts.cookedHtml: I have an item in a project plan that needs to have its start date in the timeline column dependent on Milestone 1, but its end date (and duration) dependent on Milestone 2. Trying to use dependencies with lag, but am drawing a blank to get it to work. Any ideas?

posts.author: Avo_FluidApps (Avo)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @PetraD - totally possible with Smart Timeline + Duration, it gives you more control over start/end logic. Clever use case, and the app’s flexibility is perfect for this! Let me know if you want help setting it up.
